ksa_text: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although AI/ML Engineering is an edge domain for the Director of Data Engineering, this task KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.453) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.453). External reviewers may question whether this specific task KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Engineering versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: O*NET, DCWF, and ML engineering job market data confirm AI/ML competencies for technical data leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI/ML Engineering appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Data Engineering.
